caption: In an indoor office or training setting, two women wearing light-colored face masks and dark jackets sit side-by-side at a long wooden table. Behind them are computer monitors and technical equipment. The woman on the left wears a blue shirt under her dark vest and looks toward the woman on the right. The woman on the right wears a dark jacket and interacts with a white pump bottle of sanitizer on the table. A smartphone and several pieces of white paper lie on the table in front of them. In the bottom right corner of the scene, a logo is visible with the text "Sim Week" and the tagline "BETTER TRAINING, BETTER OUTCOMES". As the sequence progresses, the woman on the right reaches for and manipulates the sanitizer bottle while the woman on the left remains seated, observing her colleague.
